sources.title: Hellbound: 13 verdammte Seelen (HORROR Film auf Deutsch in voller Länge, ganzer HORROR in 4K)

metadata.Plot: Shatter and Jackson, two Chicago police officers, are investigating the brutal murder of a rabbi and are summoned to Israel for questioning. While they are in Israel they continue their investigation there on some leads they have. After a while they begin to understand that they are trying to catch a supernatural being, and if they don't do it fast something terrible will happen.
metadata.Writer: Ian Rabin, Anthony Ridio, Brent Friedman
metadata.Actors: Chuck Norris, Calvin Levels, Christopher Neame
